label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out this square dance problem. So there are five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them starts with a partner: Alice with Jamie, Bob with Patrick, Claire with Ophelia, Dave with Melissa, and Eve with Rodrigo. Then there are a series of partner switches, and we need to track where Alice ends up at the end. First, let me list out the initial pairings: - Alice ↔ Jamie - Bob ↔ Patrick - Claire ↔ Ophelia - Dave ↔ Melissa - Eve ↔ Rodrigo Now, the sequence of partner swaps is as follows: 1. Dave and Bob switch partners. 2. Claire and Dave switch partners. 3. Eve and Alice switch partners. 4. Claire and Eve switch partners. 5. Alice and Eve switch partners. I need to go step by step through each of these swaps and keep track of who is with whom. Let me try to do this carefully. Starting with the first swap: Dave and Bob switch partners. Initially, Dave is with Melissa and Bob is with Patrick. After swapping, Dave will be with Patrick, and Bob will be with Melissa. So after step 1: - Alice ↔ Jamie - Bob ↔ Melissa - Claire ↔ Ophelia - Dave ↔ Patrick - Eve ↔ Rodrigo Second swap: Claire and Dave switch partners. Claire is currently with Ophelia, and Dave is with Patrick. After swapping, Claire will be with Patrick, and Dave will be with Ophelia. So after step 2: - Alice ↔ Jamie - Bob ↔ Melissa - Claire ↔ Patrick - Dave ↔ Ophelia - Eve ↔ Rodrigo Third swap: Eve and Alice switch partners. Eve is currently with Rodrigo, and Alice is with Jamie.
